name: Ginger Spicy Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken - breasts, split, boned, skinned
1 medium Red pepper, cut into 1/4 by 2 inches (1 1/2 cups)
1 medium Green pepper, cut into 1/4 by 2 inches (1 1/2 cups)
2 tbsp Chopped fresh cilantro or parsley
2 - 3 tsp shredded fresh ginger or 3/4 to 1 tsp. ground ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly salt the chicken.
2. Cook in oil over medium heat until lightly browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes. Remove and reserve.
3. Add remaining ingredients to skillet; cook, stirring frequently, 5 to 7 minutes or until peppers are tender and sauce thickens.
4. Return chicken to skillet; heat through.
Makes 4 servings.
